rationale: The only linkage evidence is a single DOI match, with no in-text citation context or reference text to show how the 2006 paper is used. While both papers involve dominant retailers (e.g., Wal-Mart), the cited study is a channel bargaining theory focused on manufacturer–retailer negotiations, whereas the citing study is an event-study of incumbent retailer stock-market impacts, so substantive dependence is plausible but not demonstrable from current evidence.
